title: RFC part
description: One normative section of the wacrg RFC. Parts are small YAML files that compile into a single ever-scrolling RFC page; each also renders as its own API-reference-style lookup page. A part's id is its permanent, citable reference.

id.description: Stable, globally-unique id; matches the file name. The permanent reference for this part.

category.description: Top-level RFC division; matches the parent directory under spec/rfc/.

order.description: Sort key within the category on the compiled RFC page (lower first).

summary.description: One-paragraph statement of what this part specifies.

normative.description: The normative requirement text (RFC 2119 MUST/SHOULD/MAY), precise enough to implement. Markdown allowed.

findings.description: Supporting detail and what is known. Markdown allowed.

parent.description: Id of the parent part this one nests under in its category (e.g. mlow-rangecoder's parent is mlow). Must resolve to a part in the same category.

requires.description: Part ids this part depends on (each must resolve to another spec/rfc part).

discovered_by.description: Contributor id credited with first reverse-engineering this part (must match spec/contributors/).

implementations.description: Current in-the-wild implementation status across flavors (light; not a full code map).

since.description: Spec version this part was introduced or last materially changed.
